mapper.insert: INSERT INTO h_health_record (user_id, steps, sleep_hours, weight, calories_burned, record_date, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{steps}, #{sleepHours}, #{weight}, #{caloriesBurned}, #{recordDate}, #{createdAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE steps = VALUES(steps), sleep_hours = VALUES(sleep_hours), weight = VALUES(weight), calories_burned = VALUES(calories_burned), created_at = VALUES(created_at)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM h_health_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date = #{recordDate}
